settings.heading: FEATURES
settings.content:
The fragrance refill is made from high-quality PE material, which slowly and evenly releases the aroma into the environment.


Ensures long-lasting and consistent scent intensity – without sudden changes or overly strong fragrance at the start.


Lasts up to 3 weeks, depending on usage frequency and ambient temperature.


High heat resistance – perfect for use in cars during both summer and winter.

settings.heading: SAFETY INFORMATION
settings.content:
The manufacturer is not responsible for any damage that may occur due to incorrect use of the product.

CAUTION: H317 May cause an allergic skin reaction. H319 Causes severe eye irritation. H412 Harmful to aquatic organisms, causes long-term effects. Keep out of reach of children. Wash hands thoroughly after use.

IF IN EYES: rinse carefully with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easily accessible. Continue to wash your eyes. If skin irritation or rash occurs: seek medical attention. Keep away from the environment. Dispose of contents/container in accordance with local/regional/national/international requirements.

Ingredients:

Linalool, 2-acetyl-1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8-octahydro- 2,3,8,8-tetramethylnaphthalene (main isomer), Citronellol, Eugenol, 1,1,5, 5-tetramethylhexahydro-2H- 2,4a-methanonaphthalen-8 (5H)-one, d-Limonene, Eucalyptol, 2,6,6,8-tetramethyl-9- acetyltricyclo{5.3.1.0(1,5)}undec- 8-ene, Piperonal, Citral, Isoeugenol.

May cause an allergic reaction.

settings.heading: HOW TO USE
settings.content:
Remove the fragrance capsule from the pouch and insert it into the car air freshener holder designed for air vent installation.

Control the fragrance intensity through your car’s air vents – simply adjust the temperature and airflow to achieve your desired scent level.

settings.heading: SHIPPING
settings.content:
Estimated delivery times within the European Union:

  • Baltics: 1–3 business days
  • Central Europe: 3–6 business days
  • Rest of EU: 4–8 business days

Delivery times may vary slightly depending on your location.

settings.text: FREYERI premium car diffuser refill designed for a clean, fresh, and long-lasting scent. This car air freshener diffuser effectively eliminates odors while delivering a consistent fragrance experience. Easy to use and compatible with most car diffuser systems, it keeps your car interior smelling modern, fresh, and inviting every day.

Cinnamon adds a warm, spicy, and slightly sweet intensity that enhances depth and creates a cozy, inviting character. It brings energy and richness to the fragrance, helping to amplify other notes while adding a bold and long-lasting impression.

Agarwood introduces a deep, rich, and luxurious woody intensity that defines the fragrance with a distinctive and sophisticated character. As a powerful base note, it adds depth, longevity, and a slightly smoky, resinous warmth that elevates the entire composition.

Tropical wood adds a smooth, warm, and slightly exotic woody backdrop that enhances balance and cohesion in a fragrance. It provides a soft, natural depth, supports longevity, and creates a relaxed, modern, and well-rounded scent profile.

settings.title: Our fragrances
settings.description: Buy 4 Refill Parfumes and Pay for only 3
